violations.text: Raw chicken observed stored above R.T.E foods (eggs and pork belly)located in walk-in cooler. Proper food storage reviewed. -Staff moved raw chicken to bottom shelf below R.T.E foods during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Bowls were observed used as scoops in several food containers -Staff removed bowls during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Employees bathroom located in basement was observed not self-closing. Employees bathroom door must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

The following plumbing were observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) Plumbing from dish machine designed to drain into three compartment sink. Per interview with PIC, this will be changed to drain into floor drain under three compartment sink 2) Small leak observed in plumbing (from kitchen) in basement area New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the mop sink area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
